summary: loop execute-agent-step is implemented and verified as a safe partial runner execution mode
findings: New CLI flag executes one agent.run step through the configured task runner, stores execute-mode runner handoff/result metadata, and stops before diff/check/evaluator steps with human_review.
residual_risks: Codex runner currently follows branch_pr route oracle and blocks on base-main worktree for branch-local trunk smoke tasks; this is outside the loop step execution contract and needs follow-up runner-route work.
